description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a short barrel and a prominent suppressor attached to the muzzle. The main body is predominantly black with a red lower receiver and magazine, giving it a striking two-tone appearance. It has a top-mounted Picatinny rail for accessory attachment and a side-mounted charging handle. The magazine is box-shaped and detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The stock is minimal or absent, making the weapon more compact and suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, matte finish and visible mechanical details.
description: A compact, black and red tactical rifle with a suppressor, detachable box magazine, and minimal or absent stock, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the rifle, with the charging handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Picatinny rail, red lower receiver, box magazine, and the full length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the suppressor and the charging handle extending to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the red lower receiver, magazine, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
